name: org.machanism.machai:bindex-maven-plugin
description: Bindex Maven Plugin is a Maven build plugin in the Machanism Machai ecosystem that integrates Machai/Bindex operations into the Maven build lifecycle for a module. It provides Maven goals (Mojos) to generate and refresh Bindex metadata (bindex.json and related resources) by scanning the module directory and using the module effective POM model via org.machanism.machai.project.layout.MavenProjectLayout. The plugin supports creating a new index (create), updating an existing index (update), registering/publishing the project's Bindex metadata to an external registry service endpoint (register), and cleaning temporary artifacts created by the tooling (clean deletes .machai/bindex-inputs.txt). The goals skip parent/aggregator modules with pom packaging. GenAI provider/model selection is configured via the required Maven property bindex.genai (example OpenAI:gpt-5) and credentials can be supplied via Maven settings.xml by specifying gw.genai.serverId to load <server> username/password into workflow properties GENAI_USERNAME and GENAI_PASSWORD. The register goal publishes to a registry URL configured with -Dbindex.register.url and can run in update mode via the update parameter (default true). Intended use cases include CI/CD pipelines and local builds to automate library discovery, semantic-search-ready metadata generation, and metadata publishing for downstream assembly/integration workflows.

usageContext: Multi-module Maven projects (skips pom packaging modules)
CI/CD pipelines for metadata generation and publishing
Library publishing, artifact discovery, and indexing workflows
Using Maven settings.xml <server> credentials via gw.genai.serverId

constructors.description: Base Mojo class for Bindex plugin goals. Maven instantiates subclasses and injects parameters such as the current org.apache.maven.project.MavenProject, the required GenAI model identifier (property bindex.genai), the project base directory, and Maven org.apache.maven.settings.Settings. The base class provides helper methods to decide whether to process the current module (skipping pom packaging), to build a org.machanism.macha.core.commons.configurator.PropertiesConfigurator (optionally loading GenAI credentials from settings.xml using gw.genai.serverId), and to create/update Bindex metadata using org.machanism.machai.bindex.BindexCreator and org.machanism.machai.project.layout.MavenProjectLayout.

examples.description: Illustrative instantiation of a concrete Mojo. In real Maven execution, Maven constructs Mojos and injects @Parameter fields before calling execute().

constructors.description: Creates the Clean goal Mojo (normally instantiated by Maven) which deletes temporary Machai/Bindex artifacts under the project base directory, currently removing .machai/bindex-inputs.txt.

examples.description: Illustrative instantiation of the Clean Mojo. Maven typically constructs and executes this goal as part of the clean lifecycle phase.

constructors.description: Creates the Create goal Mojo (normally instantiated by Maven) which generates a new Bindex index/resources for the current module during the install phase, skipping modules with pom packaging.

examples.description: Illustrative instantiation of the Create Mojo. Maven executes it via the create goal.

constructors.description: Creates the Update goal Mojo (normally instantiated by Maven) which refreshes an existing Bindex index/resources for the current module during the install phase, skipping modules with pom packaging.

examples.description: Illustrative instantiation of the Update Mojo. Maven executes it via the update goal.

constructors.description: Creates the Register goal Mojo (normally instantiated by Maven) which scans the project folder and registers/publishes Bindex metadata to an external registry endpoint during the install phase, skipping modules with pom packaging.

examples.description: Illustrative instantiation of the Register Mojo. Maven executes it via the register goal.

features.name: create
features.description: Maven goal that creates a new Bindex index/resources for the current module during the install phase. Delegates to AbstractBindexMojo.createBindex(false) and skips execution for modules with pom packaging.

examples.description: Runs the create goal to generate a fresh Bindex index for the current Maven module using the specified GenAI provider/model.

features.name: update
features.description: Maven goal that updates (refreshes) an existing Bindex index/resources for the current module during the install phase. Delegates to AbstractBindexMojo.createBindex(true) and skips execution for modules with pom packaging.

examples.description: Runs the update goal to refresh Bindex metadata for the current Maven module.

features.name: register
features.description: Maven goal that registers the project's Bindex metadata to an external registry endpoint. Creates org.machanism.machai.bindex.BindexRegister with the configured model and registry URL, sets update mode (parameter update, default true), and scans the project base directory. Skips execution for modules with pom packaging.

examples.description: Scans the module and publishes Bindex metadata to a local registry endpoint using the selected GenAI provider/model.
Registers Bindex metadata without update mode (subject to Maven parameter binding/configuration).

features.name: clean
features.description: Maven goal bound to the clean phase that removes temporary Machai/Bindex artifacts, currently deleting the inputs log file ".machai/bindex-inputs.txt" under the project base directory.

examples.description: Deletes the Machai/Bindex inputs log file created under the .machai directory.

features.name: createBindex
features.description: Shared helper used by create/update goals to build Bindex metadata. Creates org.machanism.machai.bindex.BindexCreator with the configured model and a properties configurator, sets update mode, constructs a org.machanism.machai.project.layout.MavenProjectLayout with basedir and effective POM model (project.getModel()) and processes the project folder.

examples.snippet:
org.machanism.machai.bindex.maven.AbstractBindexMojo mojo = new org.machanism.machai.bindex.maven.Create();
// Maven normally calls execute(); createBindex(update) is invoked internally by goal implementations.
examples.description: Illustrates that create/update goals delegate to the shared createBindex(update) helper to process the project folder via BindexCreator.

features.name: getConfigurator
features.description: Builds a PropertiesConfigurator for workflow execution. If gw.genai.serverId is provided, resolves the matching <server> entry from Maven settings.xml and maps its username/password to workflow properties GENAI_USERNAME and GENAI_PASSWORD. Throws MojoExecutionException when settings are unavailable or the configured server id cannot be found.

examples.description: Configures GenAI credentials via Maven settings.xml and selects the server id with gw.genai.serverId.

customizations.name: bindex.genai
customizations.description: Required Maven property/parameter selecting the GenAI provider and model identifier used by the plugin when creating/updating indices and registering metadata (for example "OpenAI:gpt-5"). Bound to org.machanism.machai.bindex.BindexCreator.MODEL_PROP_NAME.

examples.description: Selects the GenAI provider/model used by the plugin.

customizations.name: bindex.register.url
customizations.description: Maven property/parameter specifying the external registry endpoint URL to which the register goal publishes metadata.

examples.description: Configures the registry endpoint for publishing Bindex metadata.

customizations.name: update
customizations.description: Parameter for the register goal controlling whether registration performs an update (incremental refresh) while scanning and publishing metadata. Defaults to true.

examples.description: Runs register without update mode (depending on Maven parameter binding and plugin configuration).

customizations.name: gw.genai.serverId
customizations.description: Optional Maven property/parameter specifying a settings.xml <server> id used to read GenAI credentials. When set, the plugin reads <server><username> and <server><password> and provides them to workflows as GENAI_USERNAME and GENAI_PASSWORD.

examples.description: Selects the settings.xml server entry to supply GenAI credentials to the Bindex workflow.

examples.title: Create Bindex metadata during install
examples.notes: Generates bindex.json and related resources for the current non-pom module.

examples.title: Update Bindex metadata
examples.notes: Refreshes existing Bindex index/resources for the current non-pom module.

examples.title: Register metadata to a registry service
examples.notes: Scans the project folder and publishes metadata to the specified registry endpoint using the selected GenAI provider/model.

examples.title: Use Maven settings.xml credentials for GenAI
examples.notes: Loads GENAI_USERNAME/GENAI_PASSWORD from the settings.xml <server> entry with id my-genai.
